mapper.sql: select id, type, name, phone, older_name, appointment_time, create_people, create_time, status ,visit_time from lc_reservation
mapper.update: update lc_reservation set status = 3 where appointment_time <= now() and status = 0
mapper.delete:
delete from lc_reservation where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update lc_reservation set visit_time = #{visitTime} where id = #{id}
update lc_reservation set status = 1 where id = #{id}
update lc_reservation set status = 2,update_time=#{now} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lc_reservation WHERE update_time >= #{startOfDay} AND update_time < #{endOfDay} AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lc_reservation WHERE name = #{name} AND older_name = #{olderName} AND appointment_time = #{appointmentTime} AND status != 2
